saber_angle.description: Configure saber angles related to the default position

x.description: The angle in degrees rotated around the x axis, clockwise

y.description: The angle in degrees rotated around the y axis, clockwise

z.description: The angle in degrees rotated around the z axis, clockwise

default_save_path.description: The default path for where to save the map to (creates a folder there for each map). Has to end in slash

folder_loc_for_picker.description: The folder in which the picker should open. Has to end in slash
